zh.lifeSummary: 當Garnier II de Trainel於大約1130年出生時，他的父親Anseau Ier DE TRAYNEL37歲，母親Helissende DE MONTMIRAIL27歲。他和Elisabeth de Marigny至少有1個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1194年9月5日在法國布格-福朗-可特艾庫格尼享年65歲，埋葬在法國布格-福朗-可特艾庫格尼。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Garnier II de Trainel于大约1130年出生时，他的父亲Anseau Ier DE TRAYNEL37岁，母亲Helissende DE MONTMIRAIL27岁。他和Elisabeth de Marigny至少有1个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1194年9月5日在法国布格-福朗-可特艾庫格尼享年65岁，埋葬在法国布格-福朗-可特艾庫格尼。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Trainel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern): occupational name for a trapper, from Middle English trainer ‘trapper of wild animals’, an agent derivative of trainen ‘to set a trap or snare’. See Train and compare Trapp .
Altered form of German Trainer, a habitational name for someone from Train in Bavaria or Trainau in Upper Franconia.

variants.name: Trainor
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Aidan, Brendan, Ciaran, Finbar.
Irish (Ulster): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Tréinfhir ‘son of Tréanfhear’, a byname meaning ‘warrior, champion’, from tréan ‘strong’ + fear ‘man’.

variants.name: Train
meanings: from Middle English train(e) ‘trap, snare’ (Old French traine), perhaps a nickname for a trapper. See Trainer .
nickname from northern Middle English tran(e) ‘crane’ (Old Norse trani), perhaps also used as a personal name.

nameMeanings.name: Garnier
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, in origin an occupational name for someone responsible for supervising the stores kept in a granary (Old French gernier, from Latin granarium, a derivative of granum ‘grain, corn’).

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Garnier II de Trainel was born about 1130, his father, Anseau Ier DE TRAYNEL, was 37 and his mother, Helissende DE MONTMIRAIL, was 27. He had at least 1 son and 2 daughters with Elisabeth de Marigny. He died on 5 September 1194, in Courgenay, Yonne, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, at the age of 65, and was buried in Courgenay, Yonne, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Garnier II de Trainel est né environ 1130, son père, Anseau Ier DE TRAYNEL, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Helissende DE MONTMIRAIL, avait 27 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles avec Elisabeth de Marigny. Il est décédé le 5 septembre 1194, à Courgenay, Yonne, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterré à Courgenay, Yonne, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Garnier II de Trainel um 1130 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Anseau Ier DE TRAYNEL 37 und seine Mutter Helissende DE MONTMIRAIL 27. Er hatte mit Elisabeth de Marigny mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 5. September 1194 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Courgenay, Yonne, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich und wurde in Courgenay, Yonne, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Garnier II de Trainel è nato il circa 1130, il suo padre, Anseau Ier DE TRAYNEL, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Helissende DE MONTMIRAIL, aveva 27 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie con Elisabeth de Marigny. Morì il 5 settembre 1194, nel Courgenay, Yonne, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolto a Courgenay, Yonne, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Garnier II de Trainelが約1130年に生まれた時，父Anseau Ier DE TRAYNELは37歳，母Helissende DE MONTMIRAILは27歳であった。彼はElisabeth de Marignyとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1194年9月5日にフランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeイオンコウルジェナイで65歳で死去し，フランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeイオンコウルジェナイにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Garnier II de Trainel(이)가 대략 1130년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Anseau Ier DE TRAYNEL(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Helissende DE MONTMIRAIL(은)는 27세였다. 그는 Elisabeth de Marigny(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1194년 9월 5일 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e 욘 쿠르겐아이에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e 욘 쿠르겐아이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Garnier II de Trainel nasceu aproximadamente 1130, seu pai, Anseau Ier DE TRAYNEL, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Helissende DE MONTMIRAIL, tinha 27 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas com Elisabeth de Marigny. Ele faleceu em 5 de setembro de 1194, em Courgenay, Yonne, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França, com 65 anos, e foi sepultado em Courgenay, Yonne, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Garnier II de Trainel родился около 1130 г., его отцу по имени Anseau Ier DE TRAYNEL было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Helissende DE MONTMIRAIL, 27. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери от Elisabeth de Marigny. Он умер 5 сентября 1194 г. в местности коурдженеи, енн, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция в возрасте 65 лет и был похоронен в местности коурдженеи, енн, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Garnier II de Trainel nació aproximadamente 1130, su papá, Anseau Ier DE TRAYNEL, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Helissende DE MONTMIRAIL, tenía 27 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas con Elisabeth de Marigny. Murió el 5 de septiembre de 1194, en Courgenay, Yonne, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultado en Courgenay, Yonne, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia.
